_description: System health snapshot for Rinq. Updated by memory-updater agent at end of sessions.
_notes: 2026-04-14: Contacts directory dedup + hide_mobile flag. Migrations 068 (staff_extensions.hide_mobile) and 069 (address_book.email). Legacy show_in_pam toggle removed from home page. Manual address-book sync needed after deploy or wait for 2am cron.

recent_commits: 4076d33 Enrich staff contact with address book mobile when the staff source has none
1ce55af Dedupe staff against their address book copy and drop redundant phone fallback
835c32a Apply hide_mobile to address book entries and drop show_in_pam toggle
18de640 Add hide_mobile setting so staff can hide their number in the directory

migrations.notes: 068 adds staff_extensions.hide_mobile INTEGER DEFAULT 0. 069 adds address_book.email TEXT (NULL on existing rows until next sync run).

watson.notes: Production. Address book synced from Peter daily 2am.

derek.notes: Personal/test. Address book sync no-ops (no Peter).

tests.notes: Today's changes verified by Derek in the Watson tenant.

pending_operations: 2026-04-14: After deploy, trigger manual address book sync once to backfill address_book.email on existing rows (otherwise 2am cron handles it): curl -s -X POST --unix-socket /var/www/rinq/rinq.sock http://localhost/api/address-book/sync
known_issues: phone.html 5,101 lines with 109 inline JS functions — refactor deferred, fits with frontend feature work
api/routes.py 5,123 lines — deeper service extraction (RingService, CallRoutingService, VoicemailService) deferred until automated tests exist
database/db.py 3,528 lines — more mixin extractions possible (recordings, staff, participants, queues)
transfer_service.py has ~400 lines of duplication between queue-based and universal transfer methods
7 bare except clauses in transfer_service.py — should at minimum log at debug
No automated tests — all testing via /admin/test-runsheet
DND + empty queue hangs up instead of falling through to voicemail
Internal caller ID shows extension number, not agent name
Transfer modal doesn't auto-close when target answers
Call-ended vs not-answered distinction wrong for conference hangups
'On call' status lingers ~5-10s after transfer (Twilio cache lag)
Voicemail offered even when no destination configured
Per-tenant Twilio config: creds still in .env, should move to tenant-only
Watson tenant uses master Twilio account, should migrate to subaccount
Static files (ringback, hold music) not in git — copied manually during deployment
show_in_pam is a legacy Peter-only flag — removed from home-page UI 2026-04-14 but column still exists and is read by /staff-phones
